entries.title: Circuit Board
entries.body: Required to repair the junction that unlocks propulsion.

entries.title: Portable Oxygen Pump
entries.body: Carried in your inventory. Reduces suit oxygen drain to 0.5x.

entries.title: Fire Extinguisher
entries.body: Use on a burning room to clear the fire in one tick.

entries.title: Junction Calibrator
entries.body: Reduces the number of repair steps required on a junction by 1.

entries.title: Hull Breach
entries.body: Seal with a hull patch or vent it into space.

entries.title: Dock Port
entries.body: Open the dock port to board the docked ship.

entries.title: Terminal
entries.body: Access ship systems and pilot the docked vessel.

entries.title: Scanner
entries.body: Lists nearby derelicts and their travel range.

entries.title: Fire
entries.body: Fire spreads between adjacent rooms. Find an extinguisher or vent.

entries.title: Electrical Arc
entries.body: An arcing cable blocks the corridor. Wait for it to discharge.

entries.title: Hull Breach
entries.body: Vacuum exposure. Suit oxygen drains faster near an unsealed breach.

entries.title: Repair Step
entries.body: One of several steps required to complete this junction repair.

entries.title: Supply Cache
entries.body: A required supply cache. Salvage it to progress the objective.

entries.title: Disabled System
entries.body: Bring this ship system back online.

entries.title: Data Terminal
entries.body: Pull the data logs stored on this terminal.

entries.title: Reactor Excursion
entries.body: The reactor is running hot. Halt the excursion before it cascades.
